'''鈭歭-g-m''' ('''kalagam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiat|fiat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiat|fiat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-g-m
|-
! Lemma
| kalagam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilagam|thilagam]] || [[word:jilagam|jilagam]] || [[word:shilagam|shilagam]] || [[word:kilagam|kilagam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulagam|thuthulagam]] || [[word:jujulagam|jujulagam]] || [[word:shushulagam|shushulagam]] || [[word:kukulagam|kukulagam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulagam|thulagam]] || [[word:julagam|julagam]] || [[word:shulagam|shulagam]] || [[word:kulagam|kulagam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulagam|thulagam]] || [[word:julagam|julagam]] || [[word:shulagam|shulagam]] || [[word:kulagam|kulagam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelagam|thelagam]] || [[word:jelagam|jelagam]] || [[word:shelagam|shelagam]] || [[word:kelagam|kelagam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholagam|thotholagam]] || [[word:jojolagam|jojolagam]] || [[word:shosholagam|shosholagam]] || [[word:kokolagam|kokolagam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholagam|tholagam]] || [[word:jolagam|jolagam]] || [[word:sholagam|sholagam]] || [[word:kolagam|kolagam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholagam|tholagam]] || [[word:jolagam|jolagam]] || [[word:sholagam|sholagam]] || [[word:kolagam|kolagam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lagam|th忙lagam]] || [[word:j忙lagam|j忙lagam]] || [[word:sh忙lagam|sh忙lagam]] || [[word:k忙lagam|k忙lagam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalagam|thathalagam]] || [[word:jajalagam|jajalagam]] || [[word:shashalagam|shashalagam]] || [[word:kakalagam|kakalagam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalagam|thalagam]] || [[word:jalagam|jalagam]] || [[word:shalagam|shalagam]] || [[word:kalagam|kalagam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalagam|thalagam]] || [[word:jalagam|jalagam]] || [[word:shalagam|shalagam]] || [[word:kalagam|kalagam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalagam|shalagam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalagam|goshalagam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalagam|gokishalagam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalagamn眉|shalagamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalagamnkn眉|goshalagamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagamn眉|gokishalagamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalagamsh毛|shalagamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalagamnksh毛|goshalagamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalagamsh毛|gokishalagamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagamro|shalagamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagamnkro|goshalagamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagamro|gokishalagamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagamu|shalagamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagamnkmu|goshalagamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagamu|gokishalagamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalagamsher|shalagamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalagamnksher|goshalagamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalagamsher|gokishalagamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalagamng|shalagamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalagamnkng|goshalagamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalagamng|gokishalagamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalagamya|shalagamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalagamnkya|goshalagamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalagamya|gokishalagamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalagamyam|shalagamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalagamnkyam|goshalagamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalagamyam|gokishalagamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagamn眉sh毛|shalagamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagamnkn眉sh毛|goshalagamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagamn眉sh毛|gokishalagamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagamn眉ro|shalagamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagamnkn眉ro|goshalagamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagamn眉ro|gokishalagamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagamn眉mu|shalagamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagamnkn眉mu|goshalagamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagamn眉mu|gokishalagamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagamsh毛n眉|shalagamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagamnksh毛n眉|goshalagamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagamsh毛n眉|gokishalagamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagamsh毛ro|shalagamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagamnksh毛ro|goshalagamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagamsh毛ro|gokishalagamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagamsh毛mu|shalagamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagamnksh毛mu|goshalagamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagamsh毛mu|gokishalagamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagamron眉|shalagamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagamnkron眉|goshalagamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagamron眉|gokishalagamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagamrosh毛|shalagamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagamnkrosh毛|goshalagamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagamrosh毛|gokishalagamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagamromu|shalagamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagamnkromu|goshalagamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagamromu|gokishalagamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagamun眉|shalagamun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagamnkmun眉|goshalagamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagamun眉|gokishalagamun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagamush毛|shalagamush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagamnkmush毛|goshalagamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagamush毛|gokishalagamush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagamuro|shalagamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagamnkmuro|goshalagamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagamuro|gokishalagamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
